chunks.text: Order sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett.D-1557 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 20.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for respondent-university ************** Counsel for the respondent-University submits that the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Counsel for the petitioner confirms the same and, under instructions, does not press the present Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
